calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Thomas B. Hamilton, II, individually and dba Hamilton Custom Reforestation & Site Prep or Thomas B. Hamilton, III, individually and dba Hamilton Custom reforestation & Site Prep.
Defaults were entered against defendants on August 22, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 22, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 20, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Thomas B. Hamilton, II, individually and dba Hamilton Custom Reforestation & Site Prep and Thomas B. Hamilton, III, individually and dba Hamilton Custom reforestation & Site Prep as follows:

Damages/Principal - $53,567.67.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,216.68.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $415.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $58,699.35.

Additionally, plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the following leased equipment: one Used Sakai SV505D Vibratory Roller S/N VSV16-40257.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
